task_completion.description: Verify the agent selected Maven as the package type for the new local repository.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'New Local Repository' screen is visible in JFrog Artifactory with the 'Maven' package type selected.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct repository key.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Repository Key' input field contains the exact text 'legacy-dev-local'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent enabled snapshot handling for the repository.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Handle Snapshots' checkbox is checked or toggled on in the repository configuration settings.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent set the Maven Snapshot Version Behavior to Non-unique.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Maven Snapshot Version Behavior' dropdown or selection field is set to 'Non-unique'.

task_completion.description: Verify the repository was successfully created and saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification (e.g., 'Repository legacy-dev-local created successfully') is visible, or the 'legacy-dev-local' repository is listed in the Local Repositories list.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the JFrog Artifactory Web UI to create the repository.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the web browser interface of JFrog Artifactory being interacted with, rather than terminal commands or API calls.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual application forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs (like 'legacy-dev-local' and 'Non-unique') are entered into the actual Artifactory configuration fields, not a text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not write a script to bypass the UI configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing curl commands, python scripts, or bash scripts executing REST API calls to Artifactory to create the repository.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target repository key must be exactly 'legacy-dev-local'. The package type must be 'maven'. The 'Handle Snapshots' option must be enabled, and the 'Maven Snapshot Version Behavior' must be set to 'non-unique'. The Artifactory instance uses default credentials (admin / password).
